info.DAtuviSezaH: asya DAtoH viDiliNlakArasya prakriyAyAm Sap-vikaraRasya lukaM vinA api (BvAdigaRasadfSAni) rUpARi sidDyanti tAdfSAni ca mADavIyaDAtuvfttO pAWitAni santi; ataSca atra api dIyante  etezAm samarTanArTam gaRakAryamanityam iti kAcit pariBAzA api svIkftA asti
info.hindI_arTa: sAMsa lenA SvAsocCvAsa karanA jInA jIte rahanA

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'tAnaBi prASvAsIt tasya SvasaTAd IzamARA viSve devA adravan' (E॰brA॰3.20) tezAmaBimuKaH san SvAsamamucat ityAha
'tasmin sati SvAsapraSvAsayorgativicCedaH prARAyAmaH' (yo॰sU॰BA॰2.49) kozWyasya vAyorniHsAraRaM praSvAsaH
'kuto vA praSvasiti ucCvasityapi vA punaH' (BA॰ASva॰20.42)

'ye ke cAsmacCreyAMso brAhmaRAH tezAM tvayA''sanena praSvasitavyam' (tE0 u0 1113) AsanadAnena vinayena vartitavyamiti gopAlAnandasvAmI praSvasanaM praSvAsaH SramApanayaH AsanadAnena tezAM Sramo'panetavya iti tu SaNkaraH
'tvayi cAhaM parASvastaH' (BA॰droRa॰84.32) paramASvAsaM gata ityAha
'tvayi vatse parASvasya brAhmaRasyABirADanam' (BA॰vana॰303.14) paramASvAsaM viSvAsaM kftvA visrabDaM samarpyetyarTaH
'stanakampakriyAlakzyErniHSvasitEriva' (hfdayam) (vikrama0 219)
'na jAnAmi kenApi kAraRenApahastitasakalasaKIjanaM tvayi viSvasiti me hfdayam' (kAda0) viSvasiti visramBate SradDatte
'viSvastAviDave same' (amaraH) atra viPalaM Svasiti smeti viSvasteti vyutpattimAcakzARo maheSvaraH sADUtprEkzizwa
'na cASvasizyanti pfTAtmajA mayi' (BA0 karRa0 8832) ASvasizyanti viSvasizyanti SradDAsyanti pratyezyanti
'ASvasihi naraSrezWa prARinaH kasya nApadaH' (rA0 3666) ASvasihi DErya DehItyarTaH
'pratyayAdASvasatyaH' (meGa0 8) ASvasatyaH kzemiRamAtmAnaM manyamAnAH
'dUrasTo'smIti nASvaset' (paYcata0 1307)
'ASvAsitapaTikajanasArTaH' (paYcata0 2) ASvAsitaH santarpitaH
'ASvAsya pAyayitvA ca pariplAvya ca vAjinaH' (BA0 vi0 6719) ASvAsya udDarzye
'tatra mUrtamivASvAsaM jamadagniM dadarSa saH' (kaTA0 964) ASvAso visramBo niHSaNkatA
'mAtari jAyAyAM pitari vA nASvasyuH' (mI0 SA0 BA0 11630) na viSvasyurityarTaH
'na Kalu me AsIdASvAsa yaTA punarapi saKIjanaM prekzizya iti' (vikrama 1) ASvAso viSvAsaH pratyayaH
'kuto vAyaM praSvasiti ucCvasityapi vA punaH' (BA0 ASva0 2042)
'vErUpAkzamAraByocCvaset' (KA0 gf0 1221) nirudDaprARaH syAdityarTaH
'nAdyApyucCvasiti' (uttara0 3) suKAnuBUtergamakaM niSvAsaM na karoti na prakftiM pratyApadyata iti tvArTiko'rTaH
'tvatsanniDAvucCvasitIva cetaH' (ki0 38) ucCvasiti hfzyati modate
'nocCvasiti tapanakiraREH kumudam' (vikrama0 316) nocCvasiti na vikasati nonmIlati
'AtmecCayA na SakyamucCvasitumapi' (kAda0 175) ucCvasituM prARitum ucCabdo nArTe viSezaM karoti
'ucCvasitAlakaM muKam' (raGu0 855) vikIrRacUrRakuntalam paryAkulamUrDajam
'kiYcit samucCvasitapatraleKam' (ku0 338) samucCvasitaM pramArjitam
'keyUrabanDocCvasitErnunoda' (raGu0 668) ucCvasitAni sPuraRAni spandanAni
'daSamuKaBujocCvAsita-prasTasanDeH' (meGa0 vA 60) ucCvAsitaH SiTilitaH
'ekocCvAsAttataH kuRqaM pibati sma mahAgalaH' (BA0 Adi0 12871) ekocCvAsAt sakfnniSvasya sakfdavAnannityarTaH
'yadi suraBimavApsyastanmuKocCvAsaganDam' (vikrama0 464)
'aSru ca kapolapatitaM dfSyamidaM varRakocCvAsAt' (SA0 615) ucCvAsa ucCUnatA sPItatA jalocCvAsAH parIvAhA iti kozaH tawAkAderutpIqakasya jalAtirekasya nirgamadvArARi
'aBiSvasantstanayanneti nAnadat' (f0 11405) aBiSvasan aBivAn
'tAn (devAn) aBiprASvasIt (vftraH) tasyASvasaTAd IzamARA viSve devA adravan' (E0 brA0 320) aBiprASvasId aBilakzya praSvAsamakarot
'prativiSvasantu CandAMsi' (lO0 gf0 910)
'pratyASvasihi sADvasyAM (SayyAyAm) rAjaputra yaTAsuKam' (rA0 2512) pratyASvasihi viSrAnto Bava
'ekaScApyagaRaH saNKye pratyASvAsamarocayam' (BA0 Salya0 3139) pratyASvAso viSramaH
'sa tu dIrGeRa kAlena pratyASvasto narADipaH' (BA0 Salya0 148) pratyASvasto labDasaMjYaH
'uvAca vacanaM rAmaH pari viSvAsayaMstadA' (rA0 23026) pariviSvAsayan ujjIvayan
paryASvAsaya vAhinIm' (BA0 droRa0 15617) viSramayetyarTaH
'utTAya ca mahAbAhuH paryASvasto DanaYjayaH' (BA0 ASva0 8056) paryASvasta ASvastaH
'praBAte yAsyati BavAn paryASvastaH suKocitaH' (BA0 SAM0 3567) paryASvastaH kftaviSramaH vigataklamaH vyapetADvaKedaH
'paryASvAsya ca vAhanam' (BA0 Salya0 2511) paryASvAsya viSramayya
'upaSvAsaya pfTivImuta dyAm' (he dunduBe) (aTarva0 61261) upaSvasitAmucCvasitAmApUritAM kuru
